day5_after_cage_3.name: Me
day5_after_cage_3.text: *Teacher smiled. Genuinely. For the first time in 12 cycles — a smile that didn't have to wait.*

day5_after_cage_5.name: Me
day5_after_cage_5.text: *Teacher embraced me. It was warm. Impossibly warm.*

day5_after_cage_6.name: Me
day5_after_cage_6.text: *I went back to the classroom. Sat down. Sea sits next to me. Teacher Riin hands me tea. Everyone is smiling.*

day5_after_cage_7.name: Eunsu
day5_after_cage_7.text: "...{name} just has to stay by my side. Forever."

day5_after_cage_8.name: Me
day5_after_cage_8.text: *I drank the tea. It's warm. It's nice. ...Somewhere — I think I hear a voice. 'Run,' it says. But from far away, very far away.*

day5_after_cage_9.name: Me
day5_after_cage_9.text: *...Was this smile always this frightening? No. It's not frightening. ...It's not frightening. ...Why isn't it frightening?*

day5_after_cage_10.name: Me
day5_after_cage_10.text: *...I feel like I'm forgetting something. What was it? ...It's fine. I can forget. It's safe here.*

day5_after_caught_1.name: Me
day5_after_caught_1.text: *...I opened my eyes. Fluorescent lights flickering. Concrete ceiling. The basement.*

day5_after_caught_2.name: Me
day5_after_caught_2.text: *I tried to move my hands. They won't move. ...Leather straps. Strapped to a chair.*

day5_after_caught_3.name: Me
day5_after_caught_3.text: *The same as in Seolhwa's dream. Same chair. Same straps. Same fluorescent light.*

day5_after_caught_5.name: Eunsu
day5_after_caught_5.text: "...Tried to run? Do you know how worried your teacher was?"

day5_after_caught_6.name: Riin
day5_after_caught_6.text: "I'll prepare the final checkup. Just need to draw blood and hook up the IV."

day5_after_caught_7.name: Me
day5_after_caught_7.text: *Teacher Riin swabs the inside of my elbow. The cold of the alcohol pad touches my skin. ...I can't give up here.*

day5_after_caught_resist_1.name: Me
day5_after_caught_resist_1.text: *I tensed every muscle. The leather straps dig into my wrists. It hurts. I don't care.*

day5_after_caught_resist_3.name: Riin
day5_after_caught_resist_3.text: "If you move, it's dangerous. Stay still—"

day5_after_caught_resist_4.name: Me
day5_after_caught_resist_4.text: *At that moment. The power went out.*

day5_after_caught_resist_5.name: Me
day5_after_caught_resist_5.text: *In the darkness... I feel a hand. Cold, translucent. Undoing the leather straps. ...Seolhwa.*

day5_after_caught_resist_6.name: Me
day5_after_caught_resist_6.text: *The straps came undone. Seolhwa takes my hand. I thought a translucent hand couldn't be grasped... but it can.*

day5_after_caught_resist_7.name: Me
day5_after_caught_resist_7.text: *Pulled through the darkness. Muffling our footsteps. Toward the emergency exit.*

day5_after_caught_submit_1.name: Me
day5_after_caught_submit_1.text: *...The strength drains away. No energy left to resist. My head drops. My eyes close.*

day5_after_caught_submit_2.name: Me
day5_after_caught_submit_2.text: *The syringe touches my arm. The needle goes in. Cold liquid spreads through my veins.*

day5_after_caught_submit_3.name: Me
day5_after_caught_submit_3.text: *...It grows warm. Like my body is melting. Thoughts blur.*

day5_after_caught_submit_4.name: Me
day5_after_caught_submit_4.text: *I'm... forgetting something. What am I forgetting? It was important... what was it...*

day5_after_confront_1.name: Me
day5_after_confront_1.text: *From behind — footsteps. Coming up the stairs. One step. One step. Slow. Not running.*

day5_after_confront_2.name: Me
day5_after_confront_2.text: *The footsteps grow closer. The sound of dress shoes hitting concrete. Teacher Eunsu's shoes.*

day5_after_confront_3.name: Me
day5_after_confront_3.text: *Stopped. At the top of the stairs. Teacher Eunsu appeared. Out of breath. Hair disheveled.*

day5_after_confront_4.name: Me
day5_after_confront_4.text: *Teacher catches her breath, forcing the corners of her mouth up. The usual gentle smile. But the facial muscles are twitching subtly.*

day5_after_confront_5.name: Eunsu
day5_after_confront_5.text: "{name}... it's dangerous there. Come here. Come to your teacher..."

day5_after_confront_6.name: Me
day5_after_confront_6.text: *As I stepped back, the smile that had been clinging to Teacher Eunsu's face fell away with a snap. The mask shattered.*

day5_after_confront_7.name: Me
day5_after_confront_7.text: *Sweat beads on her forehead. Dark circles under her eyes. I wasn't the only one who didn't sleep tonight. A cold wind from the emergency exit passed between us.*

day5_after_confront_8.name: Eunsu
day5_after_confront_8.text: "You always do this. Every time you run. Every time you get caught. Every time from the beginning."

day5_after_confront_9.name: Eunsu
day5_after_confront_9.text: "The 1st time, I was angry. That you ran. The 2nd time, I couldn't understand. Why you would leave."

day5_after_confront_10.name: Eunsu
day5_after_confront_10.text: "From the 3rd time — I was afraid. Not that you were leaving, but that when you came back, you wouldn't know me."

day5_after_confront_11.name: Eunsu
day5_after_confront_11.text: "I hated that. So this time — I wanted to keep you from running."

day5_after_confront_12.name: Eunsu
day5_after_confront_12.text: "I thought if I was good to you, you'd stay. If I truly loved you — you wouldn't leave."

day5_after_confront_13.name: Eunsu
day5_after_confront_13.text: "...On Day 1, when you walked into the classroom. Even though it was the 13th time — my heart raced."

day5_after_confront_14.name: Eunsu
day5_after_confront_14.text: "After 12 times, you'd think I'd be used to it. But those eyes seeing me for the first time. Those eyes with no memory — they hurt every time."

day5_after_confront_15.name: Me
day5_after_confront_15.text: *Teacher stopped. In front of the emergency exit. Three meters from me. Teacher pulled a syringe from her pocket. Slowly. As if to show me.*

day5_after_confront_16.name: Me
day5_after_confront_16.text: *The liquid inside the syringe glinted under the fluorescent light. — This is what erased 12 cycles of memories. One vial of clear liquid.*

day5_after_confront_17.name: Eunsu
day5_after_confront_17.text: "Last chance, {name}. One shot and it's all over. The terrible truth, the fear you just felt, even your hatred toward me — all of it."

day5_after_confront_18.name: Eunsu
day5_after_confront_18.text: "Back to Day 1. Back to being the {name} who smiles so beautifully. ...**Please.**"

day5_after_confront_19.name: Me
day5_after_confront_19.text: *Teacher's hand is shaking. The syringe trembles. A drop falls to the floor. Tears fell from Teacher's eyes. She didn't wipe them. An expression that knows there's no point.*

day5_after_confront_20.name: Me
day5_after_confront_20.text: *Syringe and emergency exit. Oblivion and memory. Cage and sky. Seolhwa — is visible. Behind Teacher. At the bottom of the stairs. A blurry silhouette. Saying nothing. Just — watching me.*

day5_after_final_choice.name: Me
day5_after_final_choice.text: *All I have to do is push past and run. She doesn't have the strength to stop me. — But my legs won't move. The body's memory of 12 cycles remembers. That this person's embrace was safe. That this person's hands were warm.*

day5_after_true_1.name: Me
day5_after_true_1.text: *Teacher Eunsu's hand trembles. The syringe fell to the floor. Glass shattered against the tile.*

day5_after_true_3.name: Me
day5_after_true_3.text: *Teacher stepped aside. Eyes closed. As if she had no strength left to block.*

day5_after_true_4.name: Me
day5_after_true_4.text: *I passed through the emergency exit. With Yuna. The fire escape behind the old wing.*

day5_after_true_5.name: Me
day5_after_true_5.text: *The dawn air is cold. Beyond the school fence — the road is visible. I looked back.*

day5_after_true_6.name: Me
day5_after_true_6.text: *Seolhwa is standing inside the emergency exit. She can't step outside the door.*

day5_after_true_10.name: Seolhwa
day5_after_true_10.text: "I waited 6 cycles. For you to get out."

day5_after_true_11.name: Seolhwa
day5_after_true_11.text: "...I ended a year ago. ...But if you get out, that's enough."

day5_after_true_12.name: Me
day5_after_true_12.text: *Seolhwa's body turns translucent. Scattering into particles of light. That light — flows toward me. Seeps into my chest. ...It's warm. This isn't a hallucination — it's memory.*

day5_after_forget_3.name: Me
day5_after_forget_3.text: "...If these are all my memories... then those 12 unnamed lines abandoned in that basement are all me."

day5_after_forget_4.name: Me
day5_after_forget_4.text: "I can't do it... I can't handle this. It feels like my head is going to explode..."

day5_after_forget_5.name: Me
day5_after_forget_5.text: "Please erase me. Make me forget everything."

day5_after_forget_6.name: Me
day5_after_forget_6.text: *Teacher Eunsu raised the syringe. Her hand is shaking.*

day5_after_forget_8.name: Me
day5_after_forget_8.text: *The needle entered my arm. Cold. Consciousness fades.*

day5_after_forget_9.name: Me
day5_after_forget_9.text: *The last thing I saw — Seolhwa. Seolhwa is crying. Her lips move. No sound.*

day5_after_forget_10.name: Me
day5_after_forget_10.text: *...I can read it. The movement of her lips. — "Don't forget"*

day5_after_resist_2.name: Me
day5_after_resist_2.text: "You're a victim too, Teacher. You were used by the board."

day5_after_resist_4.name: Eunsu
day5_after_resist_4.text: "No. From the 3rd time on, it was my choice."

day5_after_resist_6.name: Me
day5_after_resist_6.text: "Even so. If you stay here, the 14th cycle begins. For someone else."

day5_after_resist_7.name: Me
day5_after_resist_7.text: *Teacher Eunsu stopped. Seolhwa appeared. Behind Teacher Eunsu.*

day5_after_resist_9.name: Seolhwa
day5_after_resist_9.text: "For 6 years, I watched every day. You greeting a new me every time. Smiling every time. — Breaking a little more every time."

day5_after_resist_11.name: Me
day5_after_resist_11.text: *Teacher Eunsu set the syringe on the floor. ...She stood there for a long time.*

day5_after_resist_12.name: Eunsu
day5_after_resist_12.text: "...If I go outside, everything I did will come to light."

day5_after_resist_14.name: Me
day5_after_resist_14.text: *Teacher Eunsu — cried. As if the weight of 12 cycles collapsed at once. "...How can you take me with you. After what I did to you."*

day5_after_resist_15.name: Me
day5_after_resist_15.text: *"...You should face consequences. But it's better than repeating this." I passed through the emergency exit. With Teacher Eunsu. Seolhwa smiled from inside the door. Light scattered.*

day5_after_ghost_1.name: Me
day5_after_ghost_1.text: *I can't move. My body is frozen.*

day5_after_ghost_5.name: Seolhwa
day5_after_ghost_5.text: "I watched for 6 cycles. You not being able to decide. This time too. I know. It's a habit."

day5_after_ghost_7.name: Me
day5_after_ghost_7.text: *Seolhwa looked straight at me. A hallucination — yet never this vivid before.*

day5_after_ghost_9.name: Me
day5_after_ghost_9.text: *My body moved. Seolhwa's voice — the memory inside me — moves my body. I grabbed Yuna's hand and ran for the emergency exit.*

day5_after_ghost_10.name: Me
day5_after_ghost_10.text: *Teacher Eunsu shouted from behind but I didn't stop. I stepped through the emergency exit. Looked back. Seolhwa is standing inside the door. Smiling.*

day5_after_ghost_12.name: Me
day5_after_ghost_12.text: *Seolhwa disappeared. Like light. Without a sound. At the same time — an alarm went off inside the building.*

day5_after_ghost_13.name: Me
day5_after_ghost_13.text: *The building erupted in noise. Sirens, footsteps, shouting. ...Seolhwa is gone. Inside my head too — silence. I escaped the school.*
